---
applyTo: "Views/**/*.cshtml"
description: "Lab2 UI guardrails for workshop MVC pages."
---

- Build read-only UI pages (Index and Details), never Create/Edit/Delete in this lab.
- Every entity view must include breadcrumb navigation near page top.
- Keep links between related entities visible in tables or detail sections.
- Prefer semantic headings and concise labels in Croatian.
- Keep visuals aligned with dark automotive reference style: black/dark nav, orange accent actions, strong hero treatment.
- Use icon-enhanced navigation and labels where it improves scanability (Bootstrap Icons).
- Reject plain default Bootstrap-looking output.
